steps.title: Substitute x = 2 into the function
steps.content:
We have $f(x) = 15x + 10$. To find $f(2)$, substitute $x = 2$ directly into the function:
$$f(2) = 15(2) + 10$$

steps.title: Simplify using order of operations
steps.content:
Multiply first, then add:
$$f(2) = 30 + 10 = 40$$
This matches choice C — C is correct.
